_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Creating value for money involves making the right choices for the right reasons, balancing return on investment and value for the user and the organisation.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to navigate the tension between data sharing for organizational value creation and data protection requirements, finding practical approaches that satisfy both objectives.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-007 (LS, cosine: 0.396), LS-K-001 (LS, cosine: 0.369).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.415). Shared vocabulary: [value]. DDaT-only terms [balancing, choices, creating, investment, involves, making] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, approaches, creation, data, finding, navigate] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.873, R=0.877). Balanced P/R — the 25-word DDaT element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (97.2%). The model interprets "Creating value for money involves making the right choices for the right reasons" as logically implying aspects of "Ability to navigate the tension between data sharing for organizational value cr" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.417 ≈ STS 0.415 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [value] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.4%. Shared tokens: [value]. DDaT-only: [balancing, choices, creating, investment, involves, making]. WIDAI-only: [ability, approaches, creation, data, finding, navigate].
